programmes.show_description: Unwind and let creativity flow with Studio Light Colouring Pages Mandala and Aqua Markers, perfect for calm, colourful moments.
Milestones and Memories Collection celebrates life's most meaningful moments. Designed by Mark, thoughtful designs come together to create the perfect set for special occasions.
Don't miss the American Crafts show with Birthday Special prices! The We R Makers Universal Cinch is back - a game-changing tool for crafting, journaling, and bookmaking.
Achieve perfect folds, cuts, and stamped designs with the Sizzix Limited Edition Making Tools - the Scoring Board & Trimmer and Stencil & Stamp Tool, both in an exclusive colour.
Unwind and let creativity flow with Studio Light Colouring Pages Mandala and Aqua Markers, perfect for calm, colourful moments.
HobbyMaker Repeats.
HobbyMaker Repeats.
We've missed Stuart Hillard whilst he's been on the opposite side of the world - he's back with some incredible deals - and stories!
Sandra Rushton is back with brand new patterns for the popular Macensi & Machael Elf, so you can create a whole new wardrobe.
Christine Bell is back on Sewing Street, with an hour and a half of beautiful Pinflair kits!
Sandra Rushton is back for a second hour with a brand new quilt kit, all beautifully designed by Sandra herself.
Efficient, versatile and great value for creative maker!
Chic Shoes by Alex Syberia is a stylish fashion-inspired collection, perfect for birthday cards, friend projects, celebrations, and handmade designs full of confidence and charm.
Takeover Time! Keith is back to celebrate our 4th birthday with his signature mix of quality, quantity, and fun! Enjoy all-day P&P for just £4.95 and fill your baskets.

Celebrate the beauty of spring with Yana's Tulips Collection by Yana Smakula - featuring vibrant florals, European-inspired scenes, and heartfelt sentiments.
Tune in for a HobbyMaker Exclusive launch: the A3 Metallic Watercolour Artists Set, featuring a premium 24-metallic half-pan paint box with rich, vibrant colours.
Designed and manufactured by crafters for crafters. Jo Venison is back for HobbyMaker's 4th birthday with a brand new unit to organise your crafting space.
Step into the Sweet Factory for a feast of crafty goodies - from vibrant vinyls to colourful cardstock and more!

HobbyMaker Repeats.
HobbyMaker Repeats.
Stuart Hillard is going to be launching his March Block of the Month.
Hayley Smith is back with the new QAYG kits and the popular On The Roll designs.
...Trousers Pattern: Amber Elizabeth is with us demonstrating the sell out new pattern from Sussex Seamstress - The Ferring Trousers.
Hayley Smith is back in her second hour with Rainbow panels and fabric rolls!
...Dress Pattern: Amber Elizabeth is back in her second hour with this beautiful Summer dress by Sussex Seamstress.
Christine is back with another fantastic show featuring brand-new products - bringing you fresh ideas and must-have supplies to elevate your next crafting project.
Hunkydory's Moonstone dies are creative, easy to use, and of the highest quality. The new Life of Leisure range opens a world of creativity.
Debbi Moore returns to HobbyMaker to join our birthday celebrations, bringing something special for both digital and analogue crafters.
Christine is back with another fantastic show featuring brand-new products - bringing you fresh ideas and must-have supplies to elevate your next crafting project.
Ink stunning backgrounds with Hunkydory's new range of shaped masks. Each mask in the Shaped Florals Collection features a popular individual flower.
Debbi Moore returns to HobbyMaker to join our birthday celebrations, bringing something special for both digital and analogue crafters.
Tune in to discover Hunkydory's renowned 12" x 12" Adorable Scoreboard, now in a sleek Classic Cream Edition - plus the brand-new Adorable Scoreboard Handbook 9.
Tune in for acrylic and gouache paint sets and discover bold, vibrant colour like never before. Perfect for getting creative or gifting to someone ready to explore their arty side!
